                          AREA ||i.test_range||, CODE, READONLY, ALIGN=1

                  test_range PROC
;;;25     
;;;26     static inline uint32_t test_range(const uint32_t test, const uint32_t min, const uint32_t max)
000000  4288              CMP      r0,r1
;;;27     {
000002  d303              BCC      |L1.12|
;;;28         return ((test < min) || (test > max)) ? 0 : 1;
000004  4290              CMP      r0,r2
000006  d801              BHI      |L1.12|
000008  2001              MOVS     r0,#1
;;;29     }
00000a  4770              BX       lr
                  |L1.12|
00000c  2000              MOVS     r0,#0                 ;28
00000e  4770              BX       lr
;;;30     
                          ENDP


                          AREA ||i.validate_bin_nvic||, CODE, READONLY, ALIGN=2

                  validate_bin_nvic PROC
;;;30     
;;;31     __weak uint8_t validate_bin_nvic(const uint8_t *buf)
000000  b5f1              PUSH     {r0,r4-r7,lr}
;;;32     {
;;;33         // test for known required NVIC entries
;;;34         //  00 is stack pointer (RAM address)
;;;35         //  04 is Reset vector  (FLASH address)
;;;36         //  08 NMI_Handler      (FLASH address)
;;;37         //  12 HardFault_Handler(FLASH address)
;;;38         uint32_t i = 4, nvic_val = 0;
000002  2000              MOVS     r0,#0
000004  b082              SUB      sp,sp,#8              ;32
000006  2504              MOVS     r5,#4
;;;39         uint8_t index = 0, in_range = 0;
000008  4604              MOV      r4,r0
00000a  4607              MOV      r7,r0
;;;40         // test the initial SP value
;;;41         memcpy(&nvic_val, buf + 0, sizeof(nvic_val));
00000c  9000              STR      r0,[sp,#0]
00000e  462a              MOV      r2,r5
000010  4668              MOV      r0,sp
000012  9902              LDR      r1,[sp,#8]
000014  f7fffffe          BL       __aeabi_memcpy
;;;42     
;;;43         if (0 == test_range(nvic_val, target_device.ram_start, target_device.ram_end)) {
000018  4e22              LDR      r6,|L2.164|
00001a  9800              LDR      r0,[sp,#0]
00001c  6972              LDR      r2,[r6,#0x14]  ; target_device
00001e  6931              LDR      r1,[r6,#0x10]  ; target_device
000020  f7fffffe          BL       test_range
000024  2800              CMP      r0,#0
000026  d008              BEQ      |L2.58|
000028  e012              B        |L2.80|
                  |L2.42|
;;;44             while (!(target_device.extra_ram[index].start == 0 && target_device.extra_ram[index].end == 0)) { //try additional reqions if present
;;;45                 if (1 == test_range(nvic_val, target_device.extra_ram[index].start, target_device.extra_ram[index].end)) {
00002a  6cc2              LDR      r2,[r0,#0x4c]
00002c  9800              LDR      r0,[sp,#0]
00002e  f7fffffe          BL       test_range
000032  2801              CMP      r0,#1
000034  d02f              BEQ      |L2.150|
000036  1c64              ADDS     r4,r4,#1
;;;46                     in_range = 1;
;;;47                     break;
;;;48                 }
;;;49                 index++;
000038  b2e4              UXTB     r4,r4
                  |L2.58|
00003a  00e0              LSLS     r0,r4,#3              ;44
00003c  1980              ADDS     r0,r0,r6              ;44
00003e  6c81              LDR      r1,[r0,#0x48]         ;44
000040  2900              CMP      r1,#0                 ;44
000042  d1f2              BNE      |L2.42|
000044  6cc2              LDR      r2,[r0,#0x4c]         ;44
000046  2a00              CMP      r2,#0                 ;44
000048  d1ef              BNE      |L2.42|
;;;50             }
;;;51             if (in_range == 0) {
00004a  2f00              CMP      r7,#0
00004c  d027              BEQ      |L2.158|
00004e  e022              B        |L2.150|
                  |L2.80|
;;;52                 return 0;
;;;53             }
;;;54         }
;;;55         
;;;56         
;;;57     
;;;58         // Reset_Handler
;;;59         // NMI_Handler
;;;60         // HardFault_Handler
;;;61         for (; i <= 12; i += 4) {
;;;62             memcpy(&nvic_val, buf + i, sizeof(nvic_val));
000050  9802              LDR      r0,[sp,#8]
000052  2204              MOVS     r2,#4
000054  1941              ADDS     r1,r0,r5
000056  4668              MOV      r0,sp
000058  f7fffffe          BL       __aeabi_memcpy
;;;63             if (0 == test_range(nvic_val, target_device.flash_start, target_device.flash_end)) {
00005c  68f2              LDR      r2,[r6,#0xc]  ; target_device
00005e  68b1              LDR      r1,[r6,#8]  ; target_device
000060  9800              LDR      r0,[sp,#0]
000062  f7fffffe          BL       test_range
000066  2800              CMP      r0,#0
000068  d114              BNE      |L2.148|
;;;64                 index = 0, in_range = 0;
00006a  2400              MOVS     r4,#0
00006c  4627              MOV      r7,r4
;;;65                 while (!(target_device.extra_flash[index].start == 0 && target_device.extra_flash[index].end == 0)) { //try additional reqions if present
00006e  e007              B        |L2.128|
                  |L2.112|
;;;66                     if (1 == test_range(nvic_val, target_device.extra_flash[index].start, target_device.extra_flash[index].end)) {
000070  6ac2              LDR      r2,[r0,#0x2c]
000072  9800              LDR      r0,[sp,#0]
000074  f7fffffe          BL       test_range
000078  2801              CMP      r0,#1
00007a  d00b              BEQ      |L2.148|
00007c  1c64              ADDS     r4,r4,#1
;;;67                         in_range = 1;
;;;68                         break;
;;;69                     }
;;;70                     index++;
00007e  b2e4              UXTB     r4,r4
                  |L2.128|
000080  00e0              LSLS     r0,r4,#3              ;65
000082  1980              ADDS     r0,r0,r6              ;65
000084  6a81              LDR      r1,[r0,#0x28]         ;65
000086  2900              CMP      r1,#0                 ;65
000088  d1f2              BNE      |L2.112|
00008a  6ac2              LDR      r2,[r0,#0x2c]         ;65
00008c  2a00              CMP      r2,#0                 ;65
00008e  d1ef              BNE      |L2.112|
;;;71                 }
;;;72                 if (in_range == 0) {
000090  2f00              CMP      r7,#0
000092  d004              BEQ      |L2.158|
                  |L2.148|
000094  1d2d              ADDS     r5,r5,#4
                  |L2.150|
000096  2d0c              CMP      r5,#0xc               ;61
000098  d9da              BLS      |L2.80|
;;;73                     return 0;
;;;74                 }
;;;75             }
;;;76         }
;;;77     
;;;78         return 1;
00009a  2001              MOVS     r0,#1
;;;79     }
00009c  bdfe              POP      {r1-r7,pc}
                  |L2.158|
00009e  2000              MOVS     r0,#0                 ;73
0000a0  bdfe              POP      {r1-r7,pc}
;;;80     
                          ENDP

0000a2  0000              DCW      0x0000
                  |L2.164|
                          DCD      target_device

                          AREA ||i.validate_hexfile||, CODE, READONLY, ALIGN=1

                  validate_hexfile PROC
;;;80     
;;;81     __weak uint8_t validate_hexfile(const uint8_t *buf)
000000  7801              LDRB     r1,[r0,#0]
;;;82     {
;;;83         // look here for known hex records
;;;84         // add hex identifier b[0] == ':' && b[8] == {'0', '2', '3', '4', '5'}
;;;85         return ((buf[0] == ':') && ((buf[8] == '0') || (buf[8] == '2') || (buf[8] == '3') || (buf[8] == '4') || (buf[8] == '5'))) ? 1 : 0;
000002  293a              CMP      r1,#0x3a
000004  d10a              BNE      |L3.28|
000006  7a00              LDRB     r0,[r0,#8]
000008  2830              CMP      r0,#0x30
00000a  d009              BEQ      |L3.32|
00000c  2832              CMP      r0,#0x32
00000e  d007              BEQ      |L3.32|
000010  2833              CMP      r0,#0x33
000012  d005              BEQ      |L3.32|
000014  2834              CMP      r0,#0x34
000016  d003              BEQ      |L3.32|
000018  2835              CMP      r0,#0x35
00001a  d001              BEQ      |L3.32|
                  |L3.28|
00001c  2000              MOVS     r0,#0
;;;86     }
00001e  4770              BX       lr
                  |L3.32|
000020  2001              MOVS     r0,#1                 ;85
000022  4770              BX       lr
                          ENDP
